text:
and Other Health Services Furnished by Home Health 
Agencies 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

Payment may be made by Medicare contractors to a home health agency which furnishes 
either directly or under arrangements with others the following "medical and other health 
services" to beneficiaries with Part B coverage in accordance with Part B billing and 
payment rules other than when a home health plan of care is in effect. 
 1. Surgical
